user.title: Connect to Plex
user.description:
Enter your Plex server URL and authentication token.

Your token can be found at: {token_url}

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Plex. Check the URL and make sure Plex is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Plex token. Check your X-Plex-Token.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs.

abort.already_configured: This Plex server is already configured.
